text: The solution I’m hearing is that we should give kids red dead redemption two
text_zh: 我听到的解决方案是，我们应该给孩子们玩《荒野大镖客2》

text: games that rot brains are the new Roblox ones no joke
text_zh: 那些会把脑子玩坏的游戏，现在跟Roblox一样了，说真的

text: so the kids yearn for og god of war
text_zh: 所以孩子们渴望最初的战神

text: So just give them a story game😭🙏
text_zh: 那就给他们玩个故事游戏吧😭🙏

text: So we give children celeste and hollow knight
text_zh: 所以我们给孩子们玩 Celeste 和 Hollow Knight

text: Bro Minecraft is not one of those games dude we are talking about Roblox games dude
text_zh: 哥们，Minecraft 可不是那些游戏，我们在说 Roblox 游戏

text: Minecraft is a sandbox game btw if you dont know what the means ur cooked butinecraft can be very educational
text_zh: Minecraft是个沙盒游戏，如果你不知道什么意思的话你就完了，但是Minecraft可以很有教育意义

text: Not all games are bad. Explanation: Minecraft teaches you to have a creative mind, among us tells you that even if your friends Thay can still be the enemy
text_zh: 不是所有的游戏都坏。解释：Minecraft 培养创造力，Among Us 告诉你即使是朋友也可能是敌人

text: y'all remember Wii Fit? the goal in that game was just "have fun exercising". we should bring that back
text_zh: 你们还记得 Wii Fit 吗？那游戏的宗旨就是“享受运动的乐趣”。我们应该把这个带回来

text: just let them play hollow knight
text_zh: 就让他们玩空洞骑士吧

text: I beat spiderman ps4 when I was 12, it literally opened my eyes to gaming
text_zh: 我12岁的时候就通关了蜘蛛侠PS4，它彻底打开了我对游戏的新世界。

text: Just.. give them a telltales game
text_zh: 直接给他们一个 Telltale 的游戏吧

text: so the answer is bring the Wii back is what I am hearing all the good learning options while still being fun for kids
text_zh: 所以我的意思是，把 Wii 重新带回来，这听起来像是所有好的学习选择，同时又能让孩子们玩得开心

text: So what I’ve got from this is, children NEED Sonic The Hedgehog in their life.
text_zh: 所以从这个视频我明白了，孩子们的生活里需要 Sonic The Hedgehog。

text: Or we should force Nintendo to produce the wii again so we can have kids play wii sports I mean I use to play it and it was really fun
text_zh: 或者我们应该强迫任天堂重新生产Wii，这样我们就可以让孩子们玩Wii Sports了，我是说我以前玩过，真的很有趣。

text: Let them play red dead redemption🫡
text_zh: 让他们玩《荒野大镖客》吧🫡

text: Or play vr, that’s exercise
text_zh: 或者玩 VR，那个锻炼身体

text: Man I learned so many big words from video games
text_zh: 我从电子游戏里学到了好多大词

text: the tween era of games and TV no longer exist unfortunately
text_zh: 现在游戏和电视的青少年时代已经不存在了，真可惜

text: kinect for xbox 360 was peak had my chunky self working as a kid lol!
text_zh: Kinect for Xbox 360 是巅峰，我小时候胖胖的都能玩lol！

text: I also recommend vr you can get some really good games on they're that get you moving
text_zh: 我也推荐VR，上面能找到很多很棒的游戏，能让你动起来

text: Bro I’m not paying $200 for something that can’t even play Minecraft
text_zh: 哥们，我不会花200美元买一个连《我的世界》都玩不了的东西

text: og Minecraft encourages creativity
text_zh: 原创的Minecraft能激发创造力

text: Give them kingdom hearts
text_zh: 给他们个王国之心

text: Ratchet and clank, halo, need for speed, are all games I played. There was an end goal, challenges, and progression for a reason. Games are so not fun anymore
text_zh: 瑞奇与叮当、光环、极品飞车，这些都是我玩过的游戏。游戏是有终极目标、挑战和进程的。现在的游戏一点都不好玩了

text: As long as my kid does a sport/ martial art etc consistently idc how much he plays
text_zh: 只要我孩子坚持参加一项运动/武术之类的，我不在乎他玩多久

text: Wii, oculus,Nintendo Mario party, shall I keep going?
text_zh: Wii，Oculus，任天堂马里奥派对，我还要继续说吗？

text: UNDERTALE OR DELTARUNE.
text_zh: 传说之下 或 三角战略。

text: I was literally just sweating my face off playing boxing in vr
text_zh: 我刚才玩拳击 VR，汗如雨下

text: Sounds boring ngl and there’s a bunch of games that have stories and goals
text_zh: 说实话听起来挺无聊的，而且有很多游戏都有故事和目标

text: Give kid gta 5 without access to live.
text_zh: 给孩子玩 GTA 5，但是不给访问 Live。

text: most of our video games are actually pretty intellectually stimulating at least in some way, a lot if not all of games actually activate the strategic thinking part of the brain and they help train hand eye coordination. they can also be used to train skills
text_zh: 我们玩的大部分电子游戏其实在某种程度上都能刺激智力，很多游戏（如果不是全部的话）都能激活大脑的战略思考部分，还能训练手眼协调能力。它们还可以用来训练技能

text: This is reminding me of that one game I used to play on an Xbox 360 with the kinect, and it was so much fun. Keep up the good work❤
text_zh: 这让我想起以前在Xbox 360上用Kinect玩过的一个游戏，当时超好玩。继续加油❤

text: I have learned a lot more from games that I ever did from school
text_zh: 我从游戏里学到的东西比从学校里学到的多得多

text: I played it at a beast buy it’s alright but kinda gimmicky and I think it’s just a one off thing atp just get a Wii definitely not bad just not worth it in my opinion
text_zh: 我在best buy玩过，还可以，但有点花哨，我觉得这只是昙花一现，不如直接买个Wii，不是说它不好，只是在我看来不值

text: I will say depending on the game I play, depending how many times I respawn is the amount of whatever exercise im prioritizing
text_zh: 我得说，根据玩的游戏，根据我复活的次数，来决定我优先锻炼的运动。

text: Minecraft is a good game for children, because they allow the kids to use their imagination, it helps them to be more creative in the future
text_zh: Minecraft对孩子们来说是个好游戏，因为它能让孩子发挥想象力，有助于他们将来更有创造力

text: Minecraft is peak
text_zh: Minecraft 是巅峰

text: There’s still more just look up what video games can teach you
text_zh: 还有更多呢，看看电子游戏能教你什么

text: My current problem with Fortnite
text_zh: 我现在玩《堡垒之夜》遇到的问题

text: god of war doom elden ring spider man subnatica i could name more
text_zh: 战神、毁灭战士、艾尔登法环、蜘蛛侠、深海迷航，我还能列举更多

text: nex playground is depression speedrun 🥀
text_zh: Nex Playground 抑郁速度跑 🥀

text: Had the exact same feeling when I played Let’s Go Pikachu awhile back. In comparison to the OG game it was significantly easier
text_zh: 之前玩《Let's Go Pikachu》的时候也有同样的感觉。跟初代游戏比起来，它明显简单了很多

text: Fast paced Virtual reality games
text_zh: 快节奏的虚拟现实游戏

text: Wii
text_zh: Wii

text: Ik people that learned to read becomes of a game he played
text_zh: 我知道有人因为玩了个游戏学会了识字

text: yeah I'm probably going to give them the newest gta whenever it comes out
text_zh: 嗯，等最新的 GTA 出了我估计会送给他们。

text: If I buy a game I’m gonna want it to go on forever
text_zh: 如果我买个游戏，我肯定希望它能一直玩下去

text: depends on what games u play not every game is like fortnite even tho I could give a whole summary on how fortnite strengthens the mind
text_zh: 看你玩什么游戏了，不是所有游戏都像堡垒之夜，虽然我可以详细讲讲堡垒之夜怎么锻炼脑力

text: make them play skyrim then
text_zh: 让它们玩《上古卷轴》吧

text: I play games and exercise
text_zh: 我玩游戏也锻炼身体

text: so just force them into playing story mode in call of duty
text_zh: 所以就是强迫他们玩《使命召唤》的故事模式？

text: Just get a vr and do the fitness games
text_zh: 直接买个 VR 来玩健身游戏就行了

text: even the cartoon games dont your just playing episodes
text_zh: 连那些卡通游戏都玩不了，你只是在玩剧集

text: thats why I played rdr2 when I was 7
text_zh: 我7岁的时候就是玩RDR2的

text: SO them kids bought to play titan fall but just the story
text_zh: 所以那帮小孩是要玩泰坦陨落的故事模式吧

text: play all the resident evil games from the first game to the latest game
text_zh: 玩从第一代到最新的所有生化危机游戏

text: Let them play gears of war
text_zh: 让他们玩《战争机器》

text: nuh uh I just spent 4 hours racing F2 cars with a racing simulator
text_zh: 不是吧，我刚花了 4 个小时用赛车模拟器玩 F2 赛车

text: so good games are good and kids like them and learn from them humph I wonder why
text_zh: 太好了，游戏好玩，孩子们喜欢，还能学到东西，嗯哼，真是奇怪

text: I keel like there was a game console that had this idea what was it called though? I think it was like the I, or the u
text_zh: 我记得好像有个游戏机有过这个想法，叫什么来着？好像是叫 I，或者 U

text: It’s just the Icam from the PS2 all over again…
text_zh: 这不就是 PS2 的 Icam 重演吗……

text: You must be talking about Roblox games leave my Minecraft out of this
text_zh: 你说的肯定是 Roblox 游戏，别管我的 Minecraft

text: cyberpunk 2077, God of war, God of war 2, God of war 3, God of war 2018,God of war ragnarok, Red dead redemption 2, red dead redemption, batman arkham asylum, batman arkham city, batman arkham origins, batman arkham shadow, batman arkham knight, split fiction, any legend of Zelda, elden ring, bloodborne, and many many many more all have a story stop buying a glorified phone and give them something real
text_zh: 赛博朋克 2077，战神，战神 2，战神 3，战神 2018，战神诸神黄昏，荒野大镖客 2，荒野大镖客，蝙蝠侠阿卡姆疯人院，蝙蝠侠阿卡姆之城，蝙蝠侠阿卡姆起源，蝙蝠侠阿卡姆暗影，蝙蝠侠阿卡姆骑士，分裂现实，任何塞尔达传说，艾尔登法环，血源诅咒，以及更多更多更多都有故事，别再买个花哨的手机了，给他们点真实的东西

text: Put them on ghost of yotei/tsushima
text_zh: 把它们放在《对马岛之魂》/《Ghost of Tsushima》上

text: Rip off Wii 🫩✌️🎋
text_zh: Wii 的骗钱版 🫩✌️🎋

text: make them all play dark souls, it's a great idea
text_zh: 让他们都玩《黑暗之魂》，这是个好主意

text: I grew up playing pokemon and Harvest moon as a kid .. you needed to learn how it worked and get better.
text_zh: 我小时候玩宝可梦和牧场物语…你需要学会怎么玩，然后变得更强。

text: technology is good, but smart people use it to take dumb people's money.
text_zh: 科技是好的，但聪明人利用它来骗傻子钱。

text: gonna make my kid play elden ring
text_zh: 我要让我孩子玩艾尔登法环

text: Yessir and boring and crappy art design
text_zh: 是的，而且无聊而且艺术设计糟糕

text: The problem with video games today is that they suck
text_zh: 现在视频游戏的问题就是它们太烂了

text: It kinda does suck for em because there are NO little kid games that each you anything and you can try and feed them a game with a lesson but the lesson ain’t getting across
text_zh: 对他们来说有点糟糕，因为根本没有什么教小孩子东西的游戏，你就算想让他们玩个有教育意义的游戏，教育意义也传达不下去。

text: So there's a reason why I played the last of us at the age of 11
text_zh: 所以，当年我11岁玩《最后生还者》是有原因的

text: just make kids play granny
text_zh: 直接让孩子们玩《Granny》不就行了

text: seat for those parents that say video games right brains it's actually inaccurate scientific studies show the video game is actually help us see I had terrible reaction time until I started playing games I'm actively better at dodgeball I can dodge things flying at me faster I'm able to catch better so my reaction time is a lot better due to old games because of the QuickTime events
text_zh: 给那些说电子游戏伤大脑的家长们看看，其实这是不准确的，科学研究表明，电子游戏其实对我们有帮助，我以前反应特别慢，直到我开始玩游戏，我现在玩躲避球玩得特别好，能更快地躲开飞过来的东西，接球也更好，所以我的反应速度因为玩老游戏好了很多，因为那些快速反应事件。
